caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt is seated in a studio setting. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in white lettering. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background is a room filled with framed photographs on the walls, a white mannequin torso wearing a white garment, and clothing racks. Various logos are visible on the screen, including one that says "SURE" and another that reads "BOSSLY FIT". Throughout the sequence, the man is seen speaking and smiling, his facial expression shifting slightly as he talks. He remains in the same seated position, looking toward someone off-screen to his left, while the camera captures a close-up of his upper body and head.
